problem id: 2b88fafb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  11111001 -> 10011111
  00000010 -> 00100000
  10110100 -> 01001111
  01001111 -> 11110110
  00110010 -> 00100011
  01000111 -> 01110110
  10100000 -> 00001111
  10100011 -> 00111111

query: 00001101
predicted answer: 11010000
